heading: Interest and penalties for certain overpayments
label: 3707 Interest and penalties for certain overpayments

children.label: A
children.text: for the period beginning on the date the overpayment was made to the contractor and ending on the date the contractor repays the amount of such overpayment to the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: at the current rate prescribed by the Secretary of the Treasury under section 6621 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986; and
if the submission of such defective data was a knowing submission, for an additional amount equal to the amount of the overpayment.

children.heading: .—Liability Not Affected by Refusal to Submit Certification
children.label: b .—Liability Not Affected by Refusal to Submit Certification
children.text: Any liability under this section of a contractor that submits cost or pricing data but refuses to submit the certification required by with respect to the cost or pricing data shall not be affected by the refusal to submit such certification.section 3702(b) of this title
